channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Inside Netflix’s War Machine: Alan Ritchson & Patrick Hughes on the Brutal Sci-Fi Action Epic
41 Years Later, This '80s Sci-Fi Cult Classic Is Quietly Returning With a Brand-New Sequel
Michael B. Jordan And Ryan Coogler Have Become One Of Hollywood's Best Duos
Bond Girl Kara in 'The Living Daylights' 'Memba Her?!
item.description: British actress Maryam d'Abo was in her mid-20s when she was cast to play Kara -- who ends up in the arms of Timothy Dalton as James Bond -- in the 19...

item.title: Tom Sandoval Teases Possibility of Engagement to Victoria Lee Robinson
item.description: Tom Sandoval is clearly loving life these days ... and a lot of it has to do with his GF -- 'cause the relationship is going so strong, he’s even teas...

item.title: Kevin Federline Facing His Own Legal Issues Amid Britney Spears' DUI Ordeal
item.description: Britney Spears’ ex-husband Kevin Federline was hit with a lawsuit over an allegedly unpaid credit card bill just weeks before the pop star’s arrest .....

item.title: Britney Spears Fired Her Sobriety Coaches Weeks Before DUI Arrest
item.description: Britney Spears showed her sober coaches the door weeks before getting arrested on suspicion of DUI. Sources with knowledge tell TMZ ... Britney fired ...

item.title: Congressman Tony Gonzales Pulls Plug on Re-Election After Aide's Death
item.description: One day after admitting he had an affair with a staffer who died by suicide, Congressman Tony Gonzales pulled the plug on his re-election campaign. Go...
